issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases.
Examples assume Express/Node, limiting applicability to other platforms.

scenarios.name: add-optional-field-no-version-bump
scenarios.rationale: Response B explicitly cites the backwards‑compatible pattern and shows a minimal change, while Response A omits that explicit reference.

scenarios.name: deprecate-old-version-with-headers
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully implements the required middleware and mounting, while Response B provides no content.
